purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.19512458.title: THE ROOM: Three Thinkers Wake Up — Descartes, Marx, Abdulkarim (Ontario Combustion Cluster, Node 3) — Crimson Hexagonal Archive

10.5281/zenodo.19512462.title: I HEREBY ABOLISH TOILET PAPER: Semantic Integrity Markers for the Ontario Combustion Cluster — Crimson Hexagonal Archive

10.5281/zenodo.19512450.title: THE SUBSTRATE BURNS: Semantic Economic Analysis of the Kimberly-Clark Warehouse Event (Ontario Combustion Cluster, Node 1) — Crimson Hexagonal Archive

10.5281/zenodo.19512460.title: THE SHADOW BURN: What If the Virality Was the Extraction? (Ontario Combustion Cluster, Node 4) — Crimson Hexagonal Archive

10.5281/zenodo.19512454.title: THE 2-PLY INFERNO: A Retrocausal Report from the Underwater Construction Authority of Dolphindiana (Ontario Combustion Cluster, Node 2) — Crimson Hexagonal Archive

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
